title: How to Launch Your Own Perfume Line: A Step-by-Step Factory Guide
description: Ready to start your fragrance brand? We map out the costs, formulation milestones, bottle decisions and production stages involved in your first factory run.

coverAlt: Fragrance development and perfume formula evaluation
seoTitle: How to Launch Your Own Perfume Line | AROMAMATRIX

title: Choosing the Right Perfume Packaging: Glass Bottles, Caps, & Sprays

title: Demystifying Scent Shipping: How to Safely Export Alcohol Perfumes
description: Understand how dangerous-goods documents, export packing and destination-specific freight routes are reviewed for fragrance shipments.
